name: harness-engineering
description: Create, diagnose, and archive restartable Codex project harnesses.

interface.shortDescription: Build and maintain restartable Codex project harnesses.
interface.longDescription: Focused workflows and a self-contained runtime for creating, diagnosing, and archiving project harness state.
defaultPrompt: 为这个项目创建一个可恢复、可验证的 harness。
诊断当前 harness 的缺口，并给出可执行的修复。
归档已完成的 harness 阶段并保留连续性证据。
